hero.subtitle: Bridging the gap between bulletproof stability and rapid innovation. I engineer systems that don't just work — they excel under pressure.

autoTesting.title: QA Automation
autoTesting.desc: Design of automation frameworks with Java and Serenity BDD for impeccable testing.

bankingCore.title: Banking Functional QA
bankingCore.desc: Management of the complete functional testing cycle in banking systems: estimation, strategy, test case design and execution, to certifications with Redeban (BRE-B). Specialist in ISO 8583 messaging validation, Postilion and Base24 gateways.

apiTesting.title: QA API
apiTesting.desc: Design and execution of comprehensive REST and SOAP tests using Postman and SoapUI, ensuring security in financial systems.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Web Development
fullstack.desc: Building modular applications integrating React, Vue3, and Tailwind with robust backends like Node.js, Express, and databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Supabase).

portfolio.title: Nursing Lab ChatBot
portfolio.desc: Conversational application built with React, Node.js and modern databases to manage laboratory reservations for the university's health sciences faculty.

contact.desc: I'm currently seeking impactful roles where technical precision meets creative problem solving. Let's build something reliable.
